name: cost-estimator
architecture: RandomForestRegressor inside a sklearn Pipeline (ColumnTransformer for cat+num)
intendedUse: Predict repair cost in PKR for damages on Pakistani-market vehicles
Used by both Live Detection and the standalone WebXR app
limitations: Pakistani market only — labour rates, paint costs, parts costs are PK-specific
Cm² feature is fabricated unless panel-as-ruler scaling is supplied
+15-40% confidence margin is heuristic, not data-derived
Random Forest is not interpretable — feature attribution available via SHAP if needed
Trained on a static snapshot; no drift detection in production

evaluation.note: Test metrics not available. See docs/live-detection-analysis/06-ml-cost-deep-dive.md for retraining plan and recommended approach (quantile regression for honest prediction intervals).

knownIssues: Severity formula previously included confidence (FIXED in cost.py:175)
Record_ID hardcoded to 0 (junk feature; remove on retrain)
Multiple_Dents_Count and Parts_Cost both hardcoded (limitations of single-damage scoring)
